name: Regenesis Cycle
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>再世律</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>リジェネシス・ペンタチューク</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you control a monster with 2500 original ATK or DEF: Target 1 card your opponent controls, or you can target 2 if you control "Regenesis Lord"; banish that card(s). If this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can banish it; Special Summon 1 monster with 2500 ATK or DEF from your hand. You can only use each effect of "Regenesis Cycle" once per turn.
eff: If you control a monster with 2500 original ATK or DEF: Target 1 card your opponent controls, or you can target 2 if you control "Regenesis Lord"; banish that card(s). If this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can banish it; Special Summon 1 monster with 2500 ATK or DEF from your hand. You can only use each effect of "Regenesis Cycle" once per turn.

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
